title: App billing - allow devs to prices for existing users (not just new ones)
excerpt:
This is a request to allow app developers to update their pricing model and have it apply to current users, not just new ones. 
Originally posted by @jarisanders – just reposting here for convenience.

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
This is a request to allow app developers to update their pricing model and have it apply to current users, not just new ones.

Originally posted by @jarisanders – just reposting here for convenience.

posts.author: hollywright (Holly Wright)
posts.cookedHtml: We view this as a critical feature for long-term growth on the monday marketplace.

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
The big problem is if a competing app is released with better pricing, we can adjust our pricing to be competitive still but our existing customers can’t get this price. They can’t ever get to our better pricing without wiping out their workflows. If they have to jump through all that hassle - they will just switch to the competitor.

This is grossly unfair to developers and customers. That monday.com thinks this is an acceptable strategy and has not yet put resolving this on its road map is very disappointing and kind of a slap in the face to devs and our mutual customers.

posts.author: courtmija (Mike Courtney)
posts.cookedHtml: This would allow us to upgrade above the highest tier currently. This limiting our use of the system.
